summary:
AquaFunded scored 55/100 overall. It offers a wide range of challenge types, from 1-step to instant funding, with no time limits and solid platform access. But post-funding rules are stricter than most competitors, and key details like average spreads and rule enforcement clarity are missing.

The platform selection now includes four options — MT5, TradeLocker, Match Trader, and cTrader (with added fee) — and pricing is transparent at the commission level. The standard profit split is 90%, with 100% available via add-on. AquaFunded has also expanded beyond CFDs with AquaFutures for futures trading and AquaFunded Crypto as a dedicated crypto product. However, with no average spreads published, no resets, and a Trustpilot profile flagged for fake reviews, AquaFunded is best suited to experienced traders who can manage its limitations.
pros: Four platform choices: MT5, TradeLocker, Match Trader, cTrader
Separate AquaFutures and AquaFunded Crypto product lines
cons: Standard profit split is 90% — 100% only available via paid add-on
Trustpilot profile flagged for fake reviews
News trading restricted on funded accounts (5-minute window around high-impact events)
bestFor: Experienced traders who want flexible evaluation choices including instant funding, scaling potential to $4M, and are comfortable managing strict post-funding consistency rules across CFD, futures, and crypto products
notIdealFor: Beginners needing guidance, traders who want published spread data, reset options, or those who prefer transparent trust signals without Trustpilot issues

verdictBlocks.heading: Our Final Verdict On AquaFunded
verdictBlocks.body:
AquaFunded offers a wide range of models with unlimited evaluation time and competitive pricing, which gives you flexibility — especially if you're looking to ease into prop trading with lower pressure. The variety of funding types, from 1-step to instant accounts, is a strength, and the brand has expanded with AquaFutures for futures trading and AquaFunded Crypto as a dedicated crypto product.

The platform selection is solid with four options — MT5, TradeLocker, Match Trader, and cTrader — spreads are raw, and the $5/lot commission is reasonable. The standard profit split is 90%, with 100% available via add-on. Scaling now goes up to $4 million. However, transparency falls short due to missing average spread data and undisclosed liquidity providers. Customer support is fast, and the Discord community is active, but a flagged Trustpilot profile and low response rate to negative reviews raise concerns.

On the rules side, news trading is allowed during evaluation but restricted on funded accounts — you cannot open or close trades within 5 minutes before or after high-impact news, including FOMC statements and speeches. Hedging is allowed within the same account only, and cross-user copy trading is prohibited. Accounts breach after 30 days of inactivity. With a total score of 55/100, AquaFunded sits in the middle of the pack. It's a decent option if you're confident managing strict rules, but there are more trader-friendly prop firms out there.

faq.q: How long does it take for AquaFunded to payout?
faq.a: AquaFunded processes payouts every 14 days as standard, with a first reward on demand upgrade available. The first payout is available 14 days after your first funded trade under the standard schedule, and all payments are handled via Riseworks through crypto or bank transfer.

AquaFunded partners with brokers like ThinkMarkets and Purple Trading, but does not officially disclose them on its website. These partnerships offer ECN pricing and institutional-grade liquidity, but the firm does not list its liquidity providers publicly.

faq.q: What is the maximum loss on AquaFunded?
faq.a: The maximum loss on AquaFunded depends on the account type and challenge model. For the standard forex challenge framework, the daily drawdown is 4% and the max drawdown is 8%. Other models vary — for example, the 1-Step Standard uses 3% daily / 6% trailing, while the 2-Step Pro uses 5% daily / 10% trailing. Instant accounts use a trailing drawdown model.

faq.q: What is the minimum withdrawal from AquaFunded?
faq.a: The minimum withdrawal amount on AquaFunded is $100. This applies to all account types, and payouts are processed bi-weekly once you meet the trading requirements and pass KYC.
